title: onobrychis aucheri
intro: Onobrychis aucheri, also known as Aucher's Spanish clover or Iranian sweet clover, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Onobrychis aucheri is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
